_comment: SHA-256 pinned vendored shapes (Phase 12). validate-shacl.ts refuses to run on mismatch (fail-closed tamper detection). Refresh ONLY via 'node scripts/seo/validate-shacl.ts --update-shapes' (network; never in CI). NOTE: Google-specific Rich Results SHACL profiles do not exist upstream (Google profiles are ShEx-only); this is schemarama's schema.org SHACL suite (Apache-2.0).
